sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung Electronics part approval data for FFC CABLE-FLAT (4343), SEC/material code 3809-003168, model 2G 4343 DETECTOR, vendor HEHUI.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a part approval and checklist record for design/development output, including inspection specifications and linked quality documents.
keyPoints: SEC Code and Material code are listed as 3809-003168.
E.D DATE is 2021-05-12 and EC History records Rev. 0.0 on 2021.05.12 as 신규 승인.
Specifications include Open/Short, Hi-pot, insulation resistance, conductor resistance, contact resistance, and length, all with Result OK.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
